screen.echoindex.title: ECHO: Index
screen.echoindex.no_recipes: No known recipe produces this item.
screen.echoindex.no_uses: No known recipe uses this item.
echoindex.category.machines.desc: Workstations, fabricators, processors, and device systems.
echoindex.category.combat.desc: Weapons, armor, hazards, and tactical gear.
echoindex.category.recipes.desc: Crafting, smelting, machine, and addon production paths.
echoindex.category.lore.desc: Recovered archive text and field notes.
echoindex.entry.index_overview.subtitle: Shared Knowledge Archive
echoindex.entry.index_overview.summary: Browse items, recipes, uses, discoveries, tutorials, and addon records from one ECHO archive.
echoindex.entry.index_overview.body: ECHO: Index catalogs player-facing content across the ECHO ecosystem. Use the inventory overlay for quick recipe and usage lookup, or open the Terminal archive for richer codex records.
echoindex.command.list: ECHO Index // Categories %s, entries %s, recipe categories %s, recipes %s.
